column1: # CHANAKYA — PER-VILLA TASK TEMPLATE  |  one row per task  |  applies to one villa or many at once
# PHASE GROUPING — rows beginning with "▌" are SECTION HEADERS
# Every task row that follows belongs to the most recent section above it
# until the next "▌" row appears. Use whatever phase names match the
# contractor's conventions — Chanakya stores them as written
# enforced vocabulary. Same phase name across rows = grouped together.
#   "3SF-2"               →  Start-to-Finish with -2 day lag (rare — finish 2 days before Act 3 starts)
# DELETE THESE COMMENT LINES BEFORE UPLOADING.
# That's all you need to know. Phase names are stored as written
# whatever wording the contractor uses on this villa. Different villas can
# use different phase names — the importer doesn't enforce a vocabulary.
